clipboardHistory.value:
- add bluetooth module to waybar - done
- add more audio notifications to niri for volume decrease, mute, unmute. take a look at the battery script in custom scripts to see how to set up different timers from the mako config - done
- find out what inhibitors do in linux (this is a waybar module) - done. it stops screensavers, locks, etc. its a 'presentation' mode
- remove cpu, memory, internet speed, and cpu temp info from waybar - done
- remove cpu notification from custom scripts - done
- add keybind to launch firefox in the work profile with a title in order to create a window rule to open in the work workspace

window-rule {
  match app-id="foot$" title="^clipse$"
  match title="^impala$"
  match title="^bluetui$"
  match title="^wiremix$"
  match app-id=r#"firefox$"# title="^Picture-in-Picture$"
  open-floating true
}
MASLOC | Weekly SIT Summary Report | 27th March 2026

Greetings everyone,

Kindly find attached the weekly report on the progress of SIT testing for the MASLOC digitisation project. Additionally, you can find the report in the "SIT Summaries" sub-folder within the "Reports" folder of the MASLOC Project Google Drive folder; the previous weekly reports can also be found there.

Best regards,
Elvis Nipah

Report Submission Procedure: Physical copies of the milestone completion report will not be submitted until the soft copy is officially acknowledged and approved.
Send the System Integration Testing (SIT) status report

Send follow-up email confirming receipt of the March completion report
SIT Testing Status Report: The System Integration Testing (SIT) status report was not sent last week, but it is confirmed to be sent out this week.

Milestone Completion Report Submission: The recipient of the milestone completion report, submitted on March 31st, has not yet acknowledged its receipt. A follow-up email will be sent today to confirm receipt. The procedure dictates that physical copies will only be submitted after the soft copy is confirmed as acceptable.

Demo Meeting Scheduling: The organization for the demo meeting is coming from Eban Capital. Jerry sent follow-up emails to Jim on Tuesday and Thursday but has not received a reply. It was decided that a phone call would be necessary to get more information.
Loan Payments View: The requested changes regarding the separation of principal and interest in the loan payments view have been successfully integrated into the system.

Tickets Management Integration: The tickets management system integration is completely integrated. The team is currently testing a couple of scenarios and will provide confirmation once testing is complete.

There has not been much progress on overall deployment, specifically regarding the Apple App Store. The team is following up with the Google Play Store, which provided feedback the day prior, and the app has been sent back for review. The team is waiting for further feedback today to determine the next actions
